name: 6p11_2_pericentromeric_SD
description: 6p11.2 pericentromeric SD block — part of the inter-chromosomal pericentromeric mosaic described by She 2004 and Bailey 2002. Contains BAGE-family pseudogene paralogs, PRIM2 fragments, and short duplicons shared with other pericentromeres (1, 2, 5, 9, 16, 22). Highly recombinogenic, frequent assembly errors in pre-T2T builds.

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentromeric mosaic of SD blocks shared with multiple chromosome pericentromeres; BAGE pseudogene paralogs; PRIM2 N-terminal fragment paralogs; resolved fully only in T2T-CHM13.
